indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and lacks a flat surface suitable for a computer workstation.

indicators.name: lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting from the pendant lamps may create glare on computer screens.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: The wire mesh chairs are not ergonomic and do not provide a comfortable working posture.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The dining table is too large and lacks a flat surface suitable for a computer workstation, while the ambient lighting from the pendant lamps may create glare on computer screens. The wire mesh chairs are not ergonomic and do not provide a comfortable working posture.
